metadata.title: Omnisearch
metadata.description: A search engine that just works

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 已禁用。请重启 Obsidian。")
Notice("Omnisearch - 已启用。请重启 Obsidian。")

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 缓存缺失或无效。在 Omnisearch 索引你的库时，可能会出现一些卡顿。")

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 缓存已清除。请重启 Obsidian。")

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 你的索引缓存可能不正确或已损坏。如果此消息持续出现，请前往设置清除缓存。",5e3)

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 创建摘录时出错，请查看开发者控制台。")

regex.target: Notice(`Omnisearch - ${n.toAdd.length} 文件需要被索引。在此过程中，Obsidian 可能会出现卡顿和冻结。`,1e4)

regex.target: Notice("Omnisearch - 你的文件已被索引。")

regex.source: .setName("Show a notification when the server starts")

regex.target: .setName("忽略阿拉伯发音符号（测试版）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable caching to speed up indexing time. In rare cases, the cache write may cause a crash in Obsidian. This option will disable itself if it happens.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用缓存以加快索引时间。在少数情况下，缓存写入可能会导致 Obsidian 崩溃。如果发生这种情况，此选项将自动禁用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Re-executes the previous query when opening Omnisearch.")
regex.target: .setDesc("打开 Omnisearch 时重新执行上一个查询。")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`By default, files that are in Obsidian's "Options > Files & Links > Excluded Files" list are downranked in results.
        Enable this option to completely hide them.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`默认情况下，位于 Obsidian 的“选项 > 文件和链接 > 排除文件”列表中的文件在结果中会被降级。
        启用此选项将完全隐藏这些文件。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Folders to downrank in search results. Files in these folders will be downranked in results.  They will still be indexed for tags, unlike excluded files.  Folders should be comma delimited.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在搜索结果中降级的文件夹。这些文件夹中的文件在结果中将被降级。与排除文件不同，它们仍会被索引以获取标签。文件夹应以逗号分隔。")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Enable this if Obsidian often freezes while making searches.
        Words shorter than 3 characters won't be used as prefixes; this can reduce search delay but will return fewer results.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`如果 Obsidian 在搜索时经常冻结，请启用此选项。
        短于 3 个字符的词将不会作为前缀使用；这可以减少搜索延迟，但会返回更少的结果。`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Enable this if you want to be able to search for URLs as separate words.
        This setting has a strong impact on indexing performance, and can crash Obsidian under certain conditions.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`如果您希望能够将 URL 作为单独的词进行搜索，请启用此选项。
        此设置对索引性能影响较大，可能在某些情况下导致 Obsidian 崩溃。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Open and create files in a new pane instead of the current pane.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在新面板中打开和创建文件，而不是在当前面板中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Navigate down the results with Ctrl/\u2318 + J/N, or navigate up with Ctrl/\u2318 + K/P")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用 Ctrl/⌘ + J/N 向下浏览结果，或使用 Ctrl/⌘ + K/P 向上浏览。Navigate down the results with Ctrl/\u2318 + J/N, or navigate up with Ctrl/\u2318 + K/P")

regex.source: .setDesc("Define the level of fuzziness for the search. The higher the fuzziness, the more results you'll get.")
regex.target: .setDesc("定义搜索的模糊度级别。模糊度越高，返回的结果越多。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a button on the sidebar to open the Vault search modal.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在侧边栏添加一个按钮以打开库搜索模态框。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Shows the contextual part of the note that matches the search. Disable this to only show filenames in results.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示与搜索匹配的笔记上下文部分。禁用此选项将仅在结果中显示文件名。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Activate this option to render line returns in result excerpts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用此选项以在结果摘录中渲染换行符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Will highlight matching results when enabled. See README for more customization options.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用时将高亮匹配结果。有关更多自定义选项，请查看 README。")

regex.source: .setDesc('You can set custom weights for values of header properties (e.g. "keywords"). Weights under 1.0 will downrank the results.')
regex.target: .setDesc('您可以为标题属性的值（例如“关键词”）设置自定义权重。低于 1.0 的权重将降低结果排名。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Will display a notification if the server is enabled, at Obsidian startup.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果服务器已启用，将在 Obsidian 启动时显示通知。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Adds a LOT of logs for debugging purposes. Don't forget to disable it.")
regex.target: .setDesc("添加大量日志用于调试。不要忘记禁用它。")

regex.target: .setDesc("Navigate down the results with使用 Ctrl/\u2318 + J/N, or navigate up with Ctrl/\u2318 + K/P")

regex.source: Changing indexing settings will clear the cache, and requires a restart of Obsidian.
regex.target: 改变索引会清空缓存，需要重启obsidian。

regex.source: Omnisearch will use Text Extractor to index the content of your PDFs.
regex.target: Omnisearch 会使用 Text Extractor 来索引你的PDF内容。

regex.source: Omnisearch will use Text Extractor to OCR your images and index their content.
regex.target: Omnisearch 会使用 Text Extractor 对你的图片进行OCR识别并索引它们的内容。

regex.source: Omnisearch will use Text Extractor to index the content of your office documents
regex.target: Omnisearch 会使用 Text Extractor 来索引你的office文档

regex.source: Omnisearch will use AI Image Analyzer to index the content of your images with ai.
regex.target: Omnisearch 会使用 AI Image Analyzer来索引你的图片内容

regex.source: If you have a custom property in your notes that you want to use as the title in search results.
regex.target: 如果你在笔记中有一个自定义属性（frontmatter），希望在搜索结果中作为标题使用。

regex.source:
Omnisearch can index filenames of "unsupported" files, such as e.g. 
.mp4
or non-extracted PDFs & images.
"Obsidian setting" will respect the value of "Files & Links > Detect all file extensions".`)).addDropdown(d=>{d.addOptions({yes:"Yes",no:"No",default:"Obsidian setting"})
regex.target:
Omnisearch 能索引不支持格式文件的名称, 例如 
.mp4
或未提取的PDF&图片.
"obsidian设置" 会遵循设置 "文件与链接 > 检测所有类型文件"中的设置.`)).addDropdown(d=>{d.addOptions({yes:"是",no:"否",default:"obsidian设置"})

regex.source:
In addition to standard md files, Omnisearch can also index other PLAINTEXT files.
Add extensions separated by a space, without the dot. Example: "txt org csv".
\u26A0\uFE0F Using extensions of non-plaintext files (like .pptx) WILL cause crashes, because Omnisearch will try to index their content.
regex.target:
除了标准 md 文件， Omnisearch 还可以索引其他PLAINTEXT 文件。
添加由空格分隔的扩展名，不带点。 例如： "txt org csv".
\u26A0\uFE0F 使用非纯文本文件的扩展名 (如 .pptx) 会导致崩溃， 因为 Omnisearch 会尝试为其内容建立索引。

regex.source: Omnisearch requires Text Extractor to index PDFs and images.
regex.target: Omnisearch需要Text Extractor插件来索引PDF和图片。

regex.source: Omnisearch requires AI Image Analyzer to index images with ai.
regex.target: Omnisearch需要AI Image Analyzer插件来借助AI索引图片。

regex.source:
Enable this if you want to be able to search for CamelCaseWords as separate words.
\u26A0\uFE0F Changing this setting will clear the cache.
regex.target:
如果你希望将驼峰命名法的单词拆分为独立单词进行搜索，请启用此选项。
\u26A0\uFE0F 更改此设置将清除缓存。

regex.source: Shows a button next to the search input, to create a note. Acts the same as the shift \u21B5 shortcut, can be useful for mobile device users.
regex.target: 在搜索输入框旁边显示一个按钮，用于创建笔记。 与 shift \u21B5 同效, 对移动端用户很有用。

regex.source: Omnisearch can be used through a simple HTTP server (more information).
regex.target: 可以通过一个简单的HTTP服务器来使用omnisearch (more information).

regex.source:
Normalize diacritics in search terms. Words like "br\xFBl\xE9e" or "\u017Elu\u0165ou\u010Dk\xFD" will be indexed as "brulee" and "zlutoucky".
\u26A0\uFE0F You probably should NOT disable this.
\u26A0\uFE0F Changing this setting will clear the cache.
regex.target:
规范搜索词中的变音符号。 诸如"br\xFBl\xE9e" or "\u017Elu\u0165ou\u010Dk\xFD"的词语会索引为"brulee" 和 "zlutoucky"。
\u26A0\uFE0F 你大概率 不 应该关闭此选项。
\u26A0\uFE0F 改变此设置会清空缓存。

regex.source: Disable Omnisearch on this device only.

Omnisearch has a security feature that automatically disables cache writing if it cannot fully perform the operation.
Use this option to force the cache to be saved, even if it causes a crash.
regex.target:
Omnisearch 有一个安全功能，如果无法完全执行操作，会自动禁用缓存写入。
使用此选项强制保存缓存，即使这可能导致崩溃。.

regex.source:
Erase all Omnisearch cache data.
          Use this if Omnisearch results are inconsistent, missing, or appear outdated.
regex.target:
清除 Omnisearch 所有的缓存数据。
          如果Omnisearch的搜索结果不一致、缺失或显得过时，请使用此方法。

regex.source: Needs a restart to fully take effect.
regex.target: 需要重启才能完全生效。

regex.source: Enabling this setting could lead to crash loops
regex.target: 启用此功能可能导致循环崩溃。
.addOptions({0:"精准匹配",1:"不太模糊",2:"非常模糊"})
